basic_details.job_title: DCHS Srikakulam Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 20 Theatre Assistant, Plumber and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Coordinator of Hospital Services Srikakulam (DCHS Srikakulam)
basic_details.short_information: District Coordinator of Hospital Services Srikakulam (DCHS Srikakulam) Various Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 04 July 2026 on the official website srikakulam.ap.gov.in. A total of 20 vacancies have been announced through the DCHS Srikakulam Various Posts Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years for all posts. Age Relaxation: SC/ST/BC & EWS: 5 years; Physically handicapped: 10 years; Ex-servicemen: 3 years in addition to service rendered.

qualification.education_qualification: SSC/10th or equivalent, ITI in plumbing/fitter/mechanic trade
qualification.details: Theatre Assistant: Must have passed SSC/10th or its equivalent. Postmortem Assistant: Must have passed SSC/10th or its equivalent. General Duty Attendant: Must have passed SSC/10th or its equivalent. Plumber: Must have passed SSC or its equivalent exam from a recognized board and Passed ITI plumbing trade/ITI Fitter trade/ITI mechanic trade from a recognized institution.

salary_details.details: Theatre Assistant: Rs. 15000/- Per Month Postmortem Assistant: Rs. 15000/- Per Month General Duty Attendant: Rs. 15000/- Per Month Plumber: Rs. 18500/- Per Month

selection_process: Aggregate of marks in qualifying examination (75 marks) Weightage for experience in government/contract/outsourcing service Weightage for number of years since passing qualifying examination
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DCHS Srikakulam Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://srikakulam.ap.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download DCHS Srikakulam Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.district_coordinator_of_hospital_service: SSC/10th or equivalent, ITI in plumbing/fitter/mechanic trade

content_sections.heading: DCHS Srikakulam Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the DCHS Srikakulam Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download DCHS Srikakulam Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Theatre Assistant: Must have passed SSC/10th or its equivalent. Postmortem Assistant: Must have passed SSC/10th or its equivalent. General Duty Attendant: Must have passed SSC/10th or its equivalent. Plumber: Must have passed SSC or its equivalent exam from a recognized board and Passed ITI plumbing trade/ITI Fitter trade/ITI mechanic trade from a recognized institution.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years for all posts. Age Relaxation: SC/ST/BC & EWS: 5 years; Physically handicapped: 10 years; Ex-servicemen: 3 years in addition to service rendered.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Theatre Assistant: Rs. 15000/- Per Month Postmortem Assistant: Rs. 15000/- Per Month General Duty Attendant: Rs. 15000/- Per Month Plumber: Rs. 18500/- Per Month

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Applications

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Aggregate of marks in qualifying examination (75 marks) Weightage for experience in government/contract/outsourcing service Weightage for number of years since passing qualifying examination

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DCHS Srikakulam Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://srikakulam.ap.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCHS Srikakulam Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications is 09-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the DCHS Srikakulam Various Posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 20 vacancies announced for various posts under the District Coordinator of Hospital Services Srikakulam.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification is SSC/10th or equivalent. For the Plumber post, ITI in plumbing/fitter/mechanic trade is also required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 42 years for all posts. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 15000/- to Rs. 18500/- per month, depending on the post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for DCHS Srikakulam Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on the aggregate of marks in the qualifying examination, weightage for experience, and weightage for the number of years since passing the qualifying examination.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST candidates. However, General/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 250/-.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Coordinator of Hospital Services Srikakulam, which is srikakulam.ap.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates as mentioned in the official notification.
